# CGEventTapPlacement.headInsertEventTap

**Case**

Specifies that a new event tap should be inserted before any pre-existing event taps at the same location.

## Declaration

```swift
case headInsertEventTap
```

## Constants

- **CGEventTapPlacement.tailAppendEventTap**: Specifies that a new event tap should be inserted after any pre-existing event taps at the same location.
